message:
fix(ast_matcher): ensure UTF-8 safe preview truncation

The matched_text_preview field could panic when truncating multi-byte
UTF-8 characters (CJK, emoji) because it used byte slicing instead of
character-aware truncation.

Changes:
- Add truncate_preview() helper that counts characters, not bytes
- Truncates to max_chars-3 characters then appends "..." for overflow
- Handles empty strings and edge cases correctly
- Remove redundant initial timeout check (check after parsing suffices)

This prevents panics like:
  'byte index 57 is not a char boundary; it is inside 用 (3 bytes)'

Test coverage includes ASCII, emoji (4-byte), and CJK (3-byte) cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
